alerts, schema, ../core

Procs

proc formatCsvReport(alerts: seq[Alert]): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Formats alerts as CSV for export 
proc formatJsonReport(alerts: seq[Alert]): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Formats alerts as JSON 
proc formatMarkdownReport(alerts: seq[Alert]): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Formats alerts as Markdown table 
proc formatTerminalTable(alerts: seq[Alert];
                         detailLevel: DetailLevel = dlSummary): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Formats alerts as a terminal table with optional color support 
proc generateReport(alerts: seq[Alert]; summary: ScreenerSummary;
                    config: ScreenerOutputConfig): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Main entry point for generating reports based on output configuration Returns formatted report as string 
proc generateReportWithSummary(alerts: seq[Alert]; summary: ScreenerSummary;
                               config: ScreenerOutputConfig;
                               showSummary: bool = true): string {....raises: [],
    tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Generates report with optional summary section Useful for showing just alerts without summary header 
proc printDetailedAlerts(alerts: seq[Alert]): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Prints alerts with full details (all indicators and metadata) 
proc printSummary(summary: ScreenerSummary): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Prints a summary of screening results
